channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX is heavily reliant on Starlink for growth and profit as it marches toward Nasdaq listing
item.description: SpaceX's IPO prospectus underscores the importance of Starlink to the company's operations.

item.title: Oil prices jump more than 3% after Iran supreme leader says uranium must remain in country
item.description: Iran's position on its enriched uranium will likely complicate peace talks with the U.S.

item.title: Quantum stocks soar as U.S. reportedly plans $2 billion ‘award’ and taking equity stakes
item.description: Quantum computing shares popped following reports that the U.S. government will award grants to nine firms operating in the space.

item.title: S&P 500 falls as oil pops, Nvidia declines after earnings: Live updates
item.description: The S&P 500 ended a three-day losing streak on Wednesday.

item.title: Trump ballroom, 'slush fund' are flashpoints as Senate takes up DHS funding bill
item.description: Democrats seek to score political points as internal GOP tensions simmer over President Donald Trump's ballroom and ''weaponization fund'

item.title: This big bank that's beating out JPMorgan Chase just made Josh Brown's Best Stocks list
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take a look at what's driving this Big Bank stock.

item.title: Spotify stock pops on guidance at first investor day since 2022
item.description: Spotify, which is holding its first investor day in four years, is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norström.

item.title: DNC releases 2024 election autopsy, party chair slams it
item.description: A disclaimer sits at the top of each page saying: "This document reflects the views of the author, not the DNC."

item.title: Stellantis targets 35% North American sales increase, led by Ram Trucks and Chrysler revival
item.description: Stellantis said at an investor day Thursday that it plans to increase its North American sales by 35% by 2030.

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor says tokenization will let investors 'shop' for yield
item.description: Bitcoin evangelist Michael Saylor told CNBC's "Squawk Box" tokenization will pose a direct challenge to traditional banking and brokerage businesses.

item.title: LIV Golf seeks to raise up to $350 million from investors as post-PIF reality sets in
item.description: LIV Golf is preparing to take its updated business plan and investor pitch on the road as soon as Thursday, in an effort to raise fresh capital.

item.title: Cleveland Cavaliers owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
item.description: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.

item.title: Nvidia says it has ‘largely conceded’ China’s AI chip market to Huawei
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the company has "largely conceded" China's advanced artificial intelligence chip market to Huawei.

item.title: Walmart issues worse-than-expected outlook as high gas prices hit shoppers
item.description: Walmart's CFO, John David Rainey, said higher tax returns helped offset the effect of elevated gas prices in the first quarter.

item.title: Nvidia analyst reaction: Street loves Jensen Huang's new $200 billion opportunity
item.description: Nvidia aims to become a bigger player in the central processing unit market with its new Vera CPU, opening up a $200 billion revenue opportunity for the firm.

item.title: Eli Lilly says next-generation weight loss drug clears crucial obesity trial
item.description: The results bring Lilly one step closer to filing for approval of the injection, retatrutide, which works differently from existing injections and pills.

item.title: How the wealthiest families invest: CNBC and Addepar launch Family Office Portfolio Tracker
item.description: Public stocks are the fastest-growing asset class for family offices, while their real estate assets are shrinking, per the CNBC Family Office Portfolio Tracker.

item.title: Iran reviews U.S. peace proposal as Trump says he’s willing to wait 'a few days'
item.description: It comes after President Donald Trump said he was prepared to wait a few more days to "get the right answers" from Tehran.

item.title: Lawsuit over federal student loan caps highlights impact on nursing shortage
item.description: Some states are challenging a Trump administration rule that caps student loans for those pursuing graduate degrees in nursing and other healthcare fields.

item.title: Stellantis unveils $70 billion turnaround plan, targets positive cash flow by 2028
item.description: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa unveiled a new five-year strategic plan Thursday worth 60 billion euros ($69.7 billion).

item.title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
item.description: Nvidia blew away the numbers again.

item.title: How to choose a mortgage lender
item.description: We've researched hundreds of mortgage lenders. Here's how to pick the best one for your budget and needs.

item.title: Oil market could enter ‘red zone’ by July as stocks dwindle ahead of summer travel season, IEA chief says
item.description: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said the single most important solution to the Iran war energy shock is the unconditional reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Retail investors will get access to SpaceX's IPO—here's what to know before buying
item.description: Elon Musk's rocket and sattelite firm will make IPO shares available on platforms such as Fidelity, Robinhood and Charles Schwab.

item.title: Billionaire families bet on semiconductor and energy stocks in first quarter during Iran war
item.description: Private investment firms of David Tepper and other billionaires doubled down on chipmakers despite the Iran war pressuring data center economics.

item.title: Three key takeaways from Putin's Beijing trip — and what they reveal about China-Russia ties
item.description: Putin left Beijing with declarations of enduring friendship with China and a stack of bilateral agreements — but without the energy breakthrough Moscow desperately sought.

item.title: Bloom Energy rises 12% after partnering with European AI infrastructure upstart in $2.6 billion deal
item.description: Nebius said Wednesday that it would deploy Bloom's fuel-cell technology to generate electricity faster and more quickly at its data centers.

item.title: Ubisoft shares plunge after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of further losses to come
item.description: Ubisoft shares plunged on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.

item.title: How to enjoy airport lounges without paying hundreds in credit card annual fees
item.description: CNBC Select goes over some of the lowest-cost credit cards that offer airport lounge access and other ways you can get it before your flight.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: IBM, Walmart, Rocket Lab, Nvidia & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
